title: Villainous Mobs
description: Addon pack for Eldritch Mobs, adds super-villain inspired powers
body:
# Ello!

Villainous Mobs is an addon datapack for Eldritch mobs that adds new powers for mobs inspired by superheroes and supervillains.

# Abilities
- Earthbender: drops stalactites around itself
- Firespreading: creates a ring of fire
- Meteor: summons a shulker bullet to crash into the player
- Smokey: constantly emits campfire smoke particles
